name: Feature request

labels: enhancement

## Use case

<!-- Describe the problem you are trying to solve. What are you building, and
where does Onity get in the way today? Concrete scenarios help more than an
abstract API request. -->

## Which pillar does this touch?

- [ ] DI (`Onity.DI`)
- [ ] Reactive (`Onity.Reactive`)
- [ ] Events / Messaging (`Onity.Messaging`)
- [ ] Unity layer (`Onity.Unity`)
- [ ] Analyzer / tooling
- [ ] Cross-cutting / not sure

## Proposed API or behavior

<!-- Optional: sketch how it might look. A small code snippet of the call site
you wish worked is very helpful. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you have tried, or how Zenject / VContainer / R3 / MessagePipe
handle this today. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: links, related issues, willingness to contribute a PR. -->
